Primary Domain:

metro.hospital (Internet Site - before it went down)



Internal/Email Domain:
metro-hospital.net (internal facing nomenclature / business email)


Compromised Data Volume:
5.355 TB of sensitive medical files


Patient Records:
123,458 patients (scripts, radiology, eKG, MRI, ultrasound, blood work)


Additional Assets:
Complete email archives, SonicWall VPN access credentials, network infrastructure information, internal backups


Payment Status:
UNPAID 400 xmr - Private negotiation / Ransom demand active


 info : Metro Hospital USA suffered a full-scale compromise. Over 5.3TB of mission-critical medical data exfiltrated, including radiology images, electronic health records (EHR), diagnostic results, and personal identifiable health information. Additionally, SonicWall appliance access and complete corporate email repositories were obtained. Decryption key and deletion of stolen data available upon ransom fulfillment. Deadline strict.
